data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram utilizes a microservices architecture to ensure scalability and resilience.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Docker containers and Kubernetes orchestration.

data.title: GraphQL API
data.description: Enables advanced querying capabilities for app data retrieval.
data.technical_spec: Built on top of Node.js with Apollo Server.

data.title: Cassandra Database
data.description: Distributed NoSQL database for managing scale of user data.
data.technical_spec: Apache Cassandra with a multi-datacenter setup.

data.title: CDN Integration
data.description: Employs CDNs to accelerate content delivery globally.

data.title: Front-End Framework
data.description: Modern web technologies used for responsive design.
